name: loom
description: Multi-agent orchestration platform — 22 specialists, local Ollama agents with tool-calling, 3-tier safety pipeline, Graphiti memory, and standalone review/debug/security/perf/seo/a11y/compliance commands

settings.name: Azure AI Foundry Key
settings.description: API key for your Azure AI Foundry serverless deployment (heavy tier primary).

settings.name: Azure Heavy Endpoint
settings.description: Base URL for your Azure AI Foundry heavy model deployment.

settings.name: Gemini API Key
settings.description: Google Gemini API key (heavy tier fallback + light tier primary + embeddings).

settings.name: LiteLLM Master Key
settings.description: Authentication key for the LiteLLM proxy server.

settings.name: Heavy Model Alias
settings.description: Virtual model name for complex reasoning tasks (default: heavy/default).

settings.name: Light Model Alias
settings.description: Virtual model name for utility and lightweight tasks (default: light/default).

settings.name: Disabled Agents
settings.description: Comma-separated list of agent names to exclude from planning.

settings.name: Max Retries
settings.description: Maximum retry attempts per phase before escalating (default: 2).

settings.name: Auto Archive
settings.description: Auto-archive session on success (true/false, default: true).

settings.name: State Directory
settings.description: Base directory for session state and plans (default: docs/loom).

settings.name: Max Concurrent
settings.description: Max subagents per parallel batch (0 = unlimited, default: 0).

settings.name: Craft Mode
settings.description: Craft pipeline mode: cloud (LiteLLM) or local (Ollama). Default: cloud.

settings.name: Agent Tool Model
settings.description: Ollama model for agent tool-calling turns (default: qwen3:4b).

settings.name: Agent Analysis Model
settings.description: Ollama model for agent analysis turns (default: deepseek-coder-v2:16b).

settings.name: Nia API Key
settings.description: API key for Nia AI codebase grounding. Get one at app.trynia.ai

settings.name: Nia Grounding
settings.description: Enable Nia-powered codebase grounding (default: true if NIA_API_KEY is set).
